'''tovapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:mealy|mealy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mealy|mealy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tovapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovapithi|tovapithi]] || [[word:tovapiji|tovapiji]] || [[word:tovapishi|tovapishi]] || [[word:tovapiki|tovapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovaputhuthu|tovaputhuthu]] || [[word:tovapujuju|tovapujuju]] || [[word:tovapushushu|tovapushushu]] || [[word:tovapukuku|tovapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovaputhu|tovaputhu]] || [[word:tovapuju|tovapuju]] || [[word:tovapushu|tovapushu]] || [[word:tovapuku|tovapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovapufthuf|tovapufthuf]] || [[word:tovapufjuf|tovapufjuf]] || [[word:tovapufshuf|tovapufshuf]] || [[word:tovapufkuf|tovapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovapethe|tovapethe]] || [[word:tovapeje|tovapeje]] || [[word:tovapeshe|tovapeshe]] || [[word:tovapeke|tovapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovapothotho|tovapothotho]] || [[word:tovapojojo|tovapojojo]] || [[word:tovaposhosho|tovaposhosho]] || [[word:tovapokoko|tovapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovapotho|tovapotho]] || [[word:tovapojo|tovapojo]] || [[word:tovaposho|tovaposho]] || [[word:tovapoko|tovapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovapofthof|tovapofthof]] || [[word:tovapofjof|tovapofjof]] || [[word:tovapofshof|tovapofshof]] || [[word:tovapofkof|tovapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfthÃŸf|tovapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfjÃŸf|tovapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfshÃŸf|tovapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfkÃŸf|tovapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|tovapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|tovapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|tovapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|tovapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfthÃŸf|tovapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfjÃŸf|tovapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfshÃŸf|tovapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfkÃŸf|tovapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfthÃŸf|tovapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfjÃŸf|tovapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfshÃŸf|tovapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovapÃŸfkÃŸf|tovapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovapÃḊthÃḊ|tovapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:tovapÃḊjÃḊ|tovapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:tovapÃḊshÃḊ|tovapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:tovapÃḊkÃḊ|tovapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovapathatha|tovapathatha]] || [[word:tovapajaja|tovapajaja]] || [[word:tovapashasha|tovapashasha]] || [[word:tovapakaka|tovapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovapatha|tovapatha]] || [[word:tovapaja|tovapaja]] || [[word:tovapasha|tovapasha]] || [[word:tovapaka|tovapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovapafthaf|tovapafthaf]] || [[word:tovapafjaf|tovapafjaf]] || [[word:tovapafshaf|tovapafshaf]] || [[word:tovapafkaf|tovapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tovapasha|tovapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovapshÃḋsha|tovapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovaprosha|tovaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovapmusha|tovapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovapyasha|tovapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovapnkshÃḋsha|gotovapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovapnkrosha|gotovapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovapnkmusha|gotovapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovapnkyasha|gotovapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tovavapasha|tovavapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovavapshÃḋsha|tovavapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovavaprosha|tovavaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovavapmusha|tovavapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovavapyasha|tovavapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovavapnkshÃḋsha|gotovavapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovavapnkrosha|gotovavapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovavapnkmusha|gotovavapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovavapnkyasha|gotovavapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tevÃḊpasha|tevÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tevÃḊpshÃḋsha|tevÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tevÃḊprosha|tevÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tevÃḊpmusha|tevÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tevÃḊpyasha|tevÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotevÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gotevÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotevÃḊpnkrosha|gotevÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotevÃḊpnkmusha|gotevÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotevÃḊpnkyasha|gotevÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tovfapasha|tovfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovfapshÃḋsha|tovfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovfaprosha|tovfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovfapmusha|tovfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovfapyasha|tovfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovfapnkshÃḋsha|gotovfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovfapnkrosha|gotovfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovfapnkmusha|gotovfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovfapnkyasha|gotovfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
